message:
fix: upgrade command asset matching for GoReleaser archives

- Update asset naming from hyphens to underscores to match GoReleaser
- Support versioned archive names (ntm_VERSION_OS_ARCH.tar.gz)
- Add .zip extraction for Windows archives
- Use "all" arch for macOS universal binaries
- Improve fallback matching for arm variants
- Better error messages showing expected asset names

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
